name: PM SVANidhi
description: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi — collateral-free working capital loan for street vendors.
eligibility_note: Open to all street vendors regardless of credit history.

name: Mudra Loan – Shishu
description: MUDRA Shishu loans up to ₹50,000 for micro-enterprises at early stage.
eligibility_note: Requires stable income and low-to-medium risk profile.

name: Mudra Loan – Kishor
description: MUDRA Kishor loans from ₹50,001 to ₹5,00,000 for growing micro-enterprises.
eligibility_note: Requires low risk profile and monthly income above ₹8,000.

name: NBFC Micro Flexi Loan
description: Flexible micro-loan from registered NBFCs for informal workers with digital transaction history.
eligibility_note: No CIBIL required. Prefers digital transaction usage.

name: NBFC Instant Cash Credit
description: Short-term instant credit for daily wage workers and informal sector employees.
eligibility_note: Available even for high-risk applicants. Higher interest rate applies.

name: SHG Group Loan
description: Self Help Group micro-loan through NABARD/NRLM for low-income women and informal workers.
eligibility_note: Lowest interest rate. Requires group membership.

name: Secured Bank Overdraft
description: Overdraft facility against savings account for workers with formal banking history.
eligibility_note: Requires bank account and low risk profile.
